title: abc buffering doesn't work with techmap cell
body:
The OpenROAD ASIC flows (Openlane and OpenROAD-flow-scripts) use abc buffering to manage fan out (`buffer -N X`). While looking at some timing issues in https://github.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenLane/issues/870 I noticed that abc buffering seems to ignore `techmap -map YY` cells. I'm not sure if it's a yosys or abc bug, or if we are driving yosys incorrectly.

## Steps to reproduce the issue

The yosys script is:

```
yosys -import
set liberty_file trimmed.lib
read_liberty -lib $liberty_file
read_verilog -sv Microwatt_FP_DFFRFile.v
synth -top Microwatt_FP_DFFRFile
opt -purge

if { [info exists ::env(DO_TECHMAP)] && $::env(DO_TECHMAP) == 1 } {
    techmap -map mux2_map.v
}

dfflibmap -liberty $liberty_file
opt
abc -D 5000 \
    -liberty trimmed.lib \
    -constr regfile.constr \
    -dff \
    -script "+strash;ifraig;scorr;dc2;dretime;strash;&get,-n;&dch,-f;&nf,{D};&put;buffer,-N,5,-v"
setundef -zero
splitnets
opt_clean -purge
hilomap -singleton -hicell sky130_fd_sc_hd__conb_1 HI -locell sky130_fd_sc_hd__conb_1 LO
insbuf -buf sky130_fd_sc_hd__buf_4 A X
write_verilog -noattr -noexpr -nohex -nodec out.v
```

And the `mu2_map.v` is:

```
module \$_MUX_ (
    output Y,
    input A,
    input B,
    input S
    );
  sky130_fd_sc_hd__mux2_1 _TECHMAP_MUX (
      .X(Y),
      .A0(A),
      .A1(B),
      .S(S)
  );
endmodule
```

FYI while debugging this issue, I realised that we don't need to manually techmap the muxes at all and I'll remove that from Openlane. The issue remains for other techmap'ed cells.

If we enable manual techmap'ing of muxes then nets on the mux inputs have massive fan outs:

```
# yosys doit.tcl > /dev/null
# grep '\.' out.v| sort | uniq -c | sort -n|tail -5
      5     .S(_19223_),
      5     .S(_19224_),
      5     .S(_19225_),
      5     .S(_19226_),
   5120     .CLK(CLK),

# DO_TECHMAP=1 yosys doit.tcl > /dev/null
# grep '\.' out.v| sort | uniq -c | sort -n|tail -20
   1280     .S(R3[1]),
   2560     .S(R1[0]),
   2560     .S(R2[0]),
   2560     .S(R3[0]),
   5120     .CLK(CLK),
```

set liberty_file trimmed.lib
read_liberty -lib $liberty_file
read_verilog -sv Microwatt_FP_DFFRFile.v

}

dfflibmap -liberty $liberty_file

abc -D 5000 \
    -liberty trimmed.lib \
    -constr regfile.constr \
    -dff \
    -script "+strash;ifraig;scorr;dc2;dretime;strash;&get,-n;&dch,-f;&nf,{D};&put;buffer,-N,5,-v"
setundef -zero
splitnets
opt_clean -purge
hilomap -singleton -hicell sky130_fd_sc_hd__conb_1 HI -locell sky130_fd_sc_hd__conb_1 LO
insbuf -buf sky130_fd_sc_hd__buf_4 A X
write_verilog -noattr -noexpr -nohex -nodec out.v
